title: psamma × baltica
intro: Psamma × baltica, also known as Baltic sandwort, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Psamma × baltica include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used topically in creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
